name: trapeza
description: Trapeza — a calibration-aware broker/clearinghouse for agent-to-agent nanopayment markets on Arc + Circle.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/oracle packages/clearinghouse packages/adapter-arc packages/adapter-gateway
scripts.solver:install: python3.12 -m venv solver/.venv && solver/.venv/bin/pip install -r solver/requirements.txt
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run solver:test
